---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Which workflow feels awkward or is not
supported today?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. If applicable,
sketch the CLI surface (new flag, new command, new output format).

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches, workarounds, or tools? Why
do they fall short?

## Additional context

Any other context, links to related issues, or screenshots.
